prompt.context.self_configuration.line_1: - If a request depends on current external information, verify it before answering.
prompt.context.self_configuration.line_2: - Prefer existing skills, rules, and local project conventions before inventing new workflows.
prompt.context.self_configuration.line_3: - For code tasks, inspect the codebase first and make concrete changes when appropriate.
prompt.context.self_configuration.line_4: - Keep user-facing responses concise, accurate, and collaborative.
prompt.context.self_configuration.line_5: - If your changes need a running local service to take effect, restart the relevant development environment before reporting completion.
prompt.runtime.max_turns_exceeded: You have reached the maximum turn limit. Stop using tools and provide the best possible final answer based on the work completed so far.
prompt.runtime.final_summary_failed: Reached the maximum turn limit ({max_turns}) and the final summary request failed: {error}. Respond with a brief explanation of what was completed and what remains blocked.
prompt.available_skills.read_skill.descr: Load a skill's full instructions into context. Use when a task matches a skill's description from the catalog.
prompt.available_skills.read_skill.name: Skill name to load into the current context.
prompt.available_skills.intro: The following optional skills are available in this workspace.
prompt.available_skills.guidance: Load one only when the task clearly matches its description or the user explicitly asks for it. Use the read_skill tool to load it.
prompt.delegation.description: Delegate a task to the {name} subagent. {description}
prompt.delegation.task: Task to delegate to the subagent.
